parsed_review.summary: Independent read-only review of CP00-637 (Risk B, 40 units, RP20.P07.M02.S13-RP20.P07.M04.S08) confirms the descriptor-only Data Room/VDR P07 failure-recovery type primary/secondary bridge pack is sound and its production_ready candidacy (descriptor-verified, not runtime-open) is supported by implementation, tests, local validation, and boundary attestations. Implementation: base freezeCp610Result (service.js:229) injects synthetic_only/no_real_data/writes_product_state===false/dispatches_*===false/emits_hermes_runtime_receipt===false; freezeCp637Result (service.js:1174) adds the five new P07 executes_*_runtime===false flags; the descriptor factory (service.js:4948) is descriptor-only with authority_boundary claude_is_final_approval=false and human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true. Exports: all nine required_public_exports exist and are real — PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:515/2395), case-set+descriptor (service.js:4915/4948), validateCoverage/validateDescriptor (validators.js:3975/3998) and Hermes/Claude/handoff builders (validators.js:4043/4058/4074). Validation: validators.js:3998 asserts synthetic_only, no_real_data, writes_product_state===false, all dispatches_*/executes_*_runtime===false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt===false, and the authority boundary; coverage validator (validators.js:3975) enforces 40 covered units, 3 sections, exact row-key sequences, and deliverable counts. Distribution integrity: deliverable counts sum to 40 (failure_recovery 20, implementation 4, hermes_evidence 4, fixture 2, test 4, security_audit 4, claude_review 2) and micro-title distribution 10/22/8 both match the prompt and the contract required_section_rows (contract 6152-6204). Hermes boundary: createDataRoomVdrCoreCp637HermesEvidencePacket (validators.js:4043) yields a descriptor-only packet with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false and receipt_shape descriptor_only_..._no_write — deterministic control-plane review/receipt handling, not product runtime (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false holds). Claude boundary: review packet is read_only with claude_is_final_approval=false (validators.js:4058); forbidden_review_evidence (contract 6243-6254) covers all CP178+ hardening rejections (auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims). Tests/validation: model.test.js carries three CP637 tests — coverage (1598), descriptor-only boundaries incl. handoff to CP00-638/RP20.P07.M04.S09 (1610), and contract-projection parity (1634); the validator script deep-equals contract.projections.cp637_* and contract.packs.cp637_p07_failure_recovery_type_primary_secondary_bridge_descriptor against the live descriptor (script:584-587) and chains cp636Handoff.to_pack_id===CP00-637 (script:915); command-evidence.json records all commands exit 0 with no_real_data=true/writes_product_state=false. Review hardening: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON (readiness-report.json); review-request uses claude-opus-4-8/max/read-only/Read,Grep,Glob; validation-report confirms no forbidden tools and summary-only prohibited (Risk B + security/review deliverables). Plan/queue consistently show CP00-637 live with generated preview CP00-638. The pending claude-review-result/construction-inspection/adjudication states reflect correct pre-review sequencing (this review is the gating step), not defects, and unrelated dirty/untracked files are properly scoped out (changed-file-scope.json). No P0-P3 findings; Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approval authority, with the enterprise trust claim closed outside this receipt under human approval.
